meta_title: Starter Series — Safe-by-default templates for AI-assisted projects.
meta_description: Use a deploy-target starter as a GitHub template, write your app, and let the included CI/CD and preflight checks handle the first shipping path.
install_subtitle: The baseline path needs no CLI package. Pick the closest shipping target, use it as a GitHub template, then push to run the included checks.
install_cli_hint: Docker deploy is the default starting point when the app shape is still undecided.
hero_p: Use a starter as a GitHub template, write your app, and keep the first shipping path covered by CI/CD, security checks, and package or deploy preflights.
picker_title: What are you trying to ship?
picker_subtitle: Pick the outcome first. The matching starter opens with its template command and first-path proof.
picker_aria: Choose a starter by shipping target
card_docker_p: Any language. One Dockerfile. SSH deploy to any VPS.
card_ext_p: MV3. Chrome Web Store + Firefox AMO. Permission audit on every push.
card_discord_p: Discord.js v14. Auto-loaded slash commands. Railway or Fly.io deploy.
card_tg_p: grammY. Polling + webhook dual mode. One-command deploy.
card_electron_p: macOS + Windows + Linux. Code signing. Auto-update via GitHub Releases.
card_npm_p: OIDC trusted publishing. Zero secrets. Provenance built in.
card_rn_p: Expo + EAS Build. Submit to App Store and Play Store from CI.
card_vscode_p: Vanilla JS. Dual publish to VS Marketplace + Open VSX.
starter_vscode_ext_tags: VS Code · Open VSX · Vanilla JS
detail_docker: Language-agnostic deployment via Docker and SSH. GitHub Actions builds your image, pushes to GHCR, then deploys to any VPS with health checks and automatic rollback. Includes Hadolint linting, multi-stage build examples for Node, Python, Go, Rust, Java, and static sites, plus an HTTPS setup guide with Caddy.
detail_ext: Manifest V3 browser extension with automated publishing to Chrome Web Store and Firefox AMO. Every push runs permission auditing, manifest validation, npm audit, linting, and tests. Seven devDependencies, zero runtime dependencies.
detail_discord: Discord.js v14 bot with file-based slash command auto-loading and graceful shutdown. Dockerized with CI/CD pipelines for Railway and Fly.io. Uses node --watch for development — no extra tooling needed.
detail_tg: grammY-based Telegram bot supporting both long-polling and webhook modes. Docker-ready with one-command deploy to Railway or Fly.io. ESLint v9 flat config included.
detail_electron: Cross-platform desktop app built with electron-builder. CI matrix builds for macOS, Windows, and Linux with code signing. Auto-update via electron-updater and GitHub Releases.
detail_npm: Publish to npm using OIDC trusted publishing — no NPM_TOKEN secrets needed. Provenance attestation built in. Ready for the npm classic token deprecation (Dec 2025). Four devDependencies total.
detail_rn: Expo + Expo Router with EAS Build and EAS Submit. CI/CD pipeline handles App Store and Play Store submission. Only EXPO_TOKEN required as a secret.
detail_vscode: VS Code extension scaffold using vanilla JS — no bundler, no framework. Dual publishing to VS Marketplace and Open VSX via GitHub Actions. Six devDependencies, zero runtime.
card_mcp_p: TypeScript + MCP SDK. Zod-validated tools. OIDC publish to npm.
detail_mcp: Model Context Protocol server with TypeScript, Zod schema validation, and stdio transport. OIDC trusted publishing to npm — zero secrets needed. Clone, add your tools, publish with npx. Eight devDependencies, two runtime.
card_py_mcp_p: Python MCP server. OIDC PyPI publish. FastMCP + async.
detail_py_mcp: Python Model Context Protocol server with FastMCP, async/await, and Pydantic models. OIDC trusted publishing to PyPI — no API tokens needed. Ready for async tool handlers, resources, and prompts out of the box.
card_cf_pages_p: Static site. Unlimited bandwidth. Global CDN free.
detail_cf_pages: Static site deployment to Cloudflare Pages via Wrangler CLI. Unlimited bandwidth on the free tier, 300+ edge locations, free SSL. Push a git tag and GitHub Actions deploys automatically.
footer_built: Built for developers who ship with AI.
